evaluators.name: Residential Screw Piling Quote Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a service-based quote request for a residential screw piling service suitable for ≥8m foundations for a rear extension in postcode 3000.

evaluators.name: Pile Estimator Warehouse Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user calculated a pile estimate for a 30m x 20m warehouse on firm clay under $60,000 and submitted an industrial quote request for postcode 5000 based on that estimate.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Piling Rig Hire Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user hired for 3 days the lowest-priced piling rig with daily rate < $1,000 and rating ≥ 4 stars, and submitted a hire booking for postcode 4000.

evaluators.name: Basement Excavation Melbourne Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added at least three Melbourne-area basement excavation projects completed between 2020 and 2023 to their shortlist.

evaluators.name: ISO 45001 Safety Compliance Enquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a safety compliance contact enquiry that references the active ISO 45001 OHS certification by its exact name and links it via related_certification_code.

evaluators.name: 10-Lot Subdivision Callback Morning Window Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a callback request about a 10-lot subdivision earthworks project with a preferred contact window between 9:00 and 11:00 AM.

evaluators.name: Site Inspection Booking Nearest Branch Retaining Wall Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a site inspection for retaining wall piling at the nearest branch to postcode 2000 on the 15th of next month.

evaluators.name: Custom Earthworks Package Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user configured an earthworks package including excavation, haulage and compaction within 40 hours and $20,000, and requested a quote for postcode 4217 (infill development).
